title: RepoBrief Frontdoor and Grounding Verifier v1
goal: Turn RepoBrief's existing evidence, required-reading, query and MCP surfaces into an agent-facing ask frontdoor and deterministic grounding-verifier workflow without adding mutation, review or truth authority to RepoBrief core.
completion: Grounding verifier contracts define answer declarations and technical grounding verdicts with mandatory non-claims.
A minimal read-only citation/range verifier checks declared citations and ranges against existing snapshot artifacts.
An ask frontdoor can build small task-conditioned context packs with freshness, availability, required reading and citations.
Ask/frontdoor usefulness is measured with gold-query evaluation before default promotion.
MCP exposure is read-only and does not trigger implicit snapshot creation.
Delta/freshness invalidation and History Lens are either implemented or explicitly deferred with evidence.

metadata.source_thread: Lenskit as LLM tool: frontdoor, citation verifier, MCP, delta bundles, history lens

live_observation.lenskit_open_pr_note: PR #929 existed as draft read-only adapter boundary at registration; this initiative does not modify that branch.
live_observation.bureau_open_pr_note: PR #327 existed for SemantAH queue selection; this initiative appends a separate task chain and does not claim now-lane ownership.

metadata.boundary_decision: Grounding verifies declared evidence mechanics, not semantic truth. Ask builds read-only context packs, not answers, patches or review verdicts.
